title: viola elongata
intro: Viola elongata, also known as the Chinese pimpernel or blue pansy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and lowering blood pressure. Viola elongata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
